description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.5 Docker image with mysql:latest, redis:latest, and postgres:latest services, caching the vendor/ruby directory, and a before_script that runs ruby -v and bundle install -j $(nproc) --path vendor. Define a rails job (default stage) that runs rails db:migrate, rails db:seed, and rails test, and sets a DATABASE_URL variable to postgresql://postgres:postgres@postgres:5432/$POSTGRES_DB. Add an rspec job that runs rspec spec. Add a rubocop job that runs rubocop. Add a deploy job of type deploy targeting the production environment that runs gem install dpl and dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_APP_NAME --api-key=$HEROKU_PRODUCTION_KEY.
